productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Leatherette Black Handbag
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish, black bag from lino perros to your accessory collection. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Height: 37 cm Width: 33 cm Depth: 8 cm Made of synthetic leather for durability Has one main roomy, zipped compartment with an inner zipped compartment and an organiser pouch for essentials One short handle and one adjustable handle woven through metallic loops for carrying ease and style A zipped pocket at the back with an vertical opening One zipped pocket on the front with another vertical zipped pocket Stitch detailing, branded zips and brand badge appliqué d on the front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
